title: Aether's Adventurepack
description: A semi-RPG-focused exploration modpack for those who enjoy an extra challenge.
body:
**Adventurepack: A semi-RPG-focused exploration modpack for those who enjoy an extra challenge.**

This modpack includes a load of mods that should make the world a lot more fun to explore. There are tons of new mobs, blocks, dimensions, and more, and if you don't like any of it, you don't need to interact with it!

This modpack is inspired by [AsianHalfSquat](https://www.youtube.com/@AsianHalfSquat) and modpacks like Crazycraft and RLCraft.

**NOTE:** You will have to configure your keybinds yourself. This pack is also very early in development and was hastily thrown together late at night, and unfortunately is also kinda abandoned. It is also recommended to manually install the Twilight Forest because Modrinth won't allow me to add it  :P



<details>
<summary>SPOILERS FOR THOSE WHO WANT TO GO INTO THIS EXPERIENCE BLIND:</summary>

Includes Parcool, Alex's Caves, Alex's Mobs, Amplified Nether, Antique Atlas, The Cave Dweller, Farmer's Delight, the Aether, Ice and Fire, Dimensional Doors, Explorer's Compass, Nature's Compass, Friends and Foes, Immersive Aircraft, L_Ender's Cataclysm, Macaw's Mods, Mutant Monsters, YUNG's Structures, Traveler's Backpacks, a few performance & QoL mods, and Essential.

There are also pre-installed shaderpacks and texture packs that you can configure to your preference.

</details>
